message:
вңЁ IZUKA BOT UPDATE LOG
вҖӢрҹ“Ұ Version Update
вҖӢрҹӣ  Fixed
вҖӢFixed AI Menu systems (Auto-response & processing stability)
вҖӢFixed addsesi multi-line string parsing (Auto Trim Guard)
вҖӢFixed missing similarity variables (didyoumean system)
вҖӢFixed sendButton Native Flow parameter (Anti-Undefined JID)
вҖӢFixed buttonParamsJson object format (JSON.stringify validation)
вҖӢImproved Attendance System stability (Removed high-load Hidetag)
вҖӢBug fixes and performance optimization
вҖӢAnd more minor fixes...
вҖӢрҹ“Ң Session & Attendance Feature List:
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .addsesi
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .setslot
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .donepay
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .unpaid
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .uncancel
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .listsesi
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .viewsesi
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .hapussesi
вӨ· рҗ”Ң  .mulaiabsen
вҖӢрҹҡҖ Added
вҖӢAdded Anonymous Confession / Menfess system (Private Chat to Group)
вҖӢAdded Group ID Helper command (.gcid / .getidgc)
вҖӢAdded core utility function copyNforward (Media & Message forwarder)
вҖӢвҡЎ Improvement
вҖӢFaster response system for session & attendance commands
вҖӢBetter API handling and button delivery on latest WhatsApp version
вҖӢCleaner message design without cluttering groupMetadata payload
вҖӢImproved stability for group usage (100% Anti-Crash Panel)
вҖӢВ«Thank you for using IZUKA BOT рҹҡҖВ»
